title: Tweaked Celestials
description: Tweaks Minecraft's celestial bodies while trying to keep a vanilla feel.
body:
All that Tweaked Celestials does is tweak textures for celestials bodies such as the Sun and Moon in order to give them a more polished look while not straying too far from vanilla, featuring modded support for some relevant mods.

Mods currently supported are:
* Ad Astra
* Stellar View
* Lunar

[Join my discord server for updates and to provide feedback!](https://discord.com/invite/XBYfv2ttUw)
